Love What You See?

Your transformation is waiting. Book your free consultation with Mayuri and take the first step toward waking up with defined, effortless beauty every single day.

Book AppointmentView Services

Nashik's premier permanent makeup studio. Expert microblading, ombre brows, lip blush, scalp micropigmentation — each treatment crafted to your unique beauty.

“Defined Beauty. Lasting Confidence.”
